query.description: Visibility filter in Temporal query syntax (e.g. 'TaskQueue = "my-queue" AND ExecutionStatus = "Running"'). Omit for all standalone activities in the namespace.

page_size.description: Maximum number of activity summaries to return. Defaults to 100.

next_page_token.description: Opaque continuation token returned by a previous list_activities call's next_page_token. Omit to start from the beginning.
